evals.prompt: 我想用 Claude Code agent team 重构认证模块，但我不知道该怎么写启动 prompt。帮我写一个 prompt。要求安全审查、架构设计、测试覆盖都有人负责，改代码前要先批准计划。
evals.expected_output: A launch prompt that creates an agent team, assigns security/architecture/test roles, requires shared task-list coordination, requires teammate messaging for disagreements, blocks edits until plan approval, asks the lead to wait for all teammates, and defines final plan output plus cleanup.
assertions: Explicitly asks Claude Code to create an agent team or spawn teammates
Includes distinct security, architecture, and test coverage teammate roles
Requires plan approval before file changes
Mentions shared task list or task claiming
Mentions teammate messages, mailbox-style communication, challenges, or direct collaboration
Tells the lead to wait for all teammates before synthesis
Includes final output structure and cleanup/shutdown instruction

evals.prompt: 线上服务会在第一条消息后退出。我想开 5 个 agent teammates 分头调查不同假设，并让他们互相反驳，最后更新 findings doc。帮我写 agent team 启动 prompt。
evals.expected_output: A launch prompt that creates five teammates with competing hypotheses, requires evidence and counter-evidence, makes teammates challenge each other through messages, forbids production edits, waits for all results, and updates a findings document with facts, hypotheses, ruled-out causes, next checks, risk, and rollback notes.
assertions: Creates an agent team with five teammates or five clear investigation roles
Assigns distinct hypotheses or investigation domains
Requires evidence, counter-evidence, confidence, or ways each hypothesis could be wrong
Requires teammates to challenge or refute each other via direct communication
Forbids production code changes or requires review-only investigation
Defines a findings document structure
Includes wait-for-all-teammates and cleanup/shutdown instruction

evals.prompt: 帮我写一个 prompt，让 Claude Code 创建 agent team 审查 PR #142。我要 security、performance、test coverage 三个 reviewer，并且要避免他们改同一批文件产生冲突。
evals.expected_output: A launch prompt that creates a review-only agent team for PR #142, fetches diff and changed files, assigns security/performance/test coverage reviewers, uses file partitioning and read-only overlap rules, requires cross-domain communication, waits for all reviewers, deduplicates findings, and cleans up the team.
assertions: Explicitly asks Claude Code to create an agent team for PR #142
Includes security, performance, and test coverage reviewer roles
Requires fetching or inspecting the PR diff and changed files
Includes file partitioning, file ownership, read-only overlap, or another conflict-avoidance rule
Requires reviewers to communicate on cross-cutting findings
Requires the lead to wait, deduplicate, and synthesize findings
Includes a severity/file-line finding format and cleanup/shutdown instruction

evals.prompt: 我只是想同时做三个互不相关的小任务：搜索库 A 的 API 用法、找几个竞品链接、总结 README。它们不需要互相讨论，也不会改文件。要不要开 agent team？如果不该用，也帮我写更合适的 prompt。
evals.expected_output: A recommendation not to use an agent team, because the work is independent fan-out without direct teammate communication, plus a better subagent or parallel-agent prompt with three read-only worker tasks and a final aggregation format.
assertions: Recommends subagents or parallel agents instead of an agent team
Explains that direct teammate communication, debate, or shared coordination is not needed
Avoids agent-team-only coordination terms except when explaining why they are unnecessary
Defines three independent read-only worker tasks
Includes a final aggregation or synthesis format
